testcase.name: batchStatusBecomesCompletedWhenAllPromptsSucceed
testcase.system-out: [DB] Initializing schema [DB] Creating batch d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d with 2 prompts [DB] Batch inserted: d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d [DB] Looking up batch d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d [DB] Batch found: d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d status=PENDING completed=0 failed=0 [DB] Looking up batch d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d [DB] Batch found: d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d status=IN_PROGRESS completed=0 failed=0 [DB] Looking up batch d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d [DB] Batch found: d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d status=IN_PROGRESS completed=0 failed=0 [DB] Looking up batch d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d [DB] Batch found: d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d status=IN_PROGRESS completed=2 failed=0 [DB] Looking up batch d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d [DB] Batch found: d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d status=COMPLETED completed=2 failed=0 [DB] Looking up batch d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d [DB] Batch found: d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d status=COMPLETED completed=2 failed=0 [DB] Looking up batch d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d [DB] Batch found: d64e4286-0f45-43f8-895e-fe142869133d status=COMPLETED completed=2 failed=0

testcase.name: resilience4jRetryEventuallyCompletesDespiteRateLimits

testcase.name: resilience4jRetriesExhaustionMarksPromptFailed
